screen is not available on this device. Bluetooth radio Bluetooth is on for CGM streaming. Turn on Bluetooth so Libre, Dexcom, Sibionics, AiDex, iCan, MQ, and other BLE sensors can connect. Nearby devices permission Nearby devices access is allowed for BLE scanning and connections. Allow Nearby devices so Android can scan for and connect to Bluetooth CGM transmitters. Location permission for BLE Location permission is allowed for legacy BLE scanning. Android 6-11 requires Location permission before apps can scan for BLE sensors. Location services Location services are on for legacy BLE scanning. On Android 6-11, BLE scanning can fail when system Location is off. Notification permission Notification permission is allowed. Allow notifications so glucose values, signal loss, and alarm alerts can reach you. App notifications App notifications are enabled. Enable app notifications so ongoing glucose status and alarms are visible. Exact alarms Exact alarm scheduling is allowed. Allow exact alarms for reliable reminders, reconnect checks, and time-critical alerts. Battery unrestricted Android battery optimization is disabled for this app. Disable battery optimization so background BLE, alarms, and network sync are not stopped. Do Not Disturb access DND access is allowed for alarm behavior. Allow DND access if you expect urgent glucose alarms to break through quiet modes. Floating glucose overlay Floating glucose is off, so overlay permission is not needed. Overlay permission is available for Floating glucose. Allow drawing over other apps before using Floating glucose. Background data Data Saver is not blocking background network use. Allow background data if you use Nightscout, mirror, watches, follower sync, or cloud services. NFC for Libre scans NFC is on for Libre scanning. Turn on NFC if you scan or start Libre sensors with the phone. Manufacturer background controls Review vendor battery, auto-start, sleep, and background activity controls. Android cannot report every vendor-specific block.
